jobs.title: Application Security Engineer
jobs.content: <p><strong>Application Security Engineer</strong></p><p>BitGo is the dominant institutional-crypto-custody and digital-asset-trust platform pioneered around the multi-signature cold-storage data model.</p>

jobs.title: Senior Director Risk Management
jobs.content: <p>Lead BitGo's Risk Management function across the institutional-crypto-custody platform stack & regulated-trust ecosystem.</p>
